calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Rones, via ZOOM, counsel for Kirkland White, Administrator.

The court advises Mr. Rones that he has failed to follow the court's local rules regarding ex parte petitions. Mr. Rones reports that the most recent ex parte petition to withdraw funds from a blocked account had been rejected due to the petition having been filed with the proposed order attached. Mr. Rones advises that a new ex parte request to withdraw funds from a blocked account will be submitted and that a proposed order thereon would be submitted separately.

The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Continued To Apr-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Rones appeared by zoom for Kirkland White.

Mr. Rones stated that he received the Probate Examiner's notes on Friday and that a response from the Executor was e-filed on Sunday, but it has not posted yet. The Court informed Mr. Rones that the petition to withdraw funds from the blocked account was rejected. The Amended Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to April 20, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-24-2021 Continued To Mar-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-27-2021 Continued To Feb-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Continued To Jan-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Continued To Oct-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Rones appeared by telephone for and with Kirkland White (Administrator) by telephone.

The Court stated that there were inappropriate distributions, that Mr. White signed the acknowledgment of duties and liabilities and should have known that the funds should have been held separately and that co-mingling is not allowed, that he should have known that no distributions are to be made without a Court order and that Mr. White violated his commitment. Mr. White stated that he understands it is a foul. Mr. Rones stated that he understands that the funds are to be placed into a blocked account, that it is appropriate to preserve the integrity of the estate and that he will have to obtain an order for the blocked account. Mr. Rones also stated that he thinks the estate will be ready to close when the Louis Armstrong estate (PES-18-302392) closes and that he doesn't see any issues with Louis' estate. The Court stated it took a look at the Louis Armstrong petition, that it is not ready and there are some problems, and that it strongly thinks it will not be resolved or ready to close next week. The Report of Administration and for Allowance of Compensation to Attorney and to Administrator for Ordinary Services, etc. is continued to and status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is set for October 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will see what happens in the Louis Armstrong estate and perhaps will sync them at the next hearing. Mr. Rones is to prepare and e-mail an order for the blocked account and use the Judicial Council form.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Adminitrator and the Attorney to appear on November 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on June 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.
